title: Add cpu-profiling to kpod
body:
Add a global flag for cpu-profiling to allow us to
profile kpod for performance issues.

To parse its results, use:

go tool pprof --text <profile_path>

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: Nit on whitespace, otherwise looks good

BTW remember one nice thing with Homu is you don't need to wait for the tests to pass - they're rerun on merge, so if the patch looks good you can fearlessly `r+` and if the tests don't pass, it isn't merged.
